added.description: Added overlapped_named_pipe_spike.dart as design anchor for future overlapped I/O
Added 10MB and 30MB echo payload tests for sustained throughput validation
Added 13 named pipe test variants achieving full parity with TCP/UDS

changed.description: Switched CI to WarpBuild runners for faster CI and updated GitHub action templates
Performance: zero-delay read polling and 32KB write chunks for Windows named pipes
Performance: write queue coalescing for named pipes
Chore: align Dart workspace resolution and dependency constraints
Chore: use gemini-3-flash-preview for doc reviews

removed.description: Removed blocking WaitNamedPipe FFI in favor of wall-clock deadline

fixed.description: Fixed microtask starvation causing duplex stall on Windows named pipes by yielding to event queue
Fixed PIPE_NOWAIT for server data I/O and non-blocking WriteFile retry to prevent deadlocks
Fixed: guard _writeChunk after yield against closed handle
Fixed: remove all non-terminal connector OS releases to prevent early stream termination
Fixed: connector retry on ERROR_FILE_NOT_FOUND to handle heavy connection contention
Fixed: 0-based serverStream index to prevent data corruption at index 0
Fixed: correct repository name grpc-dart in config.json to resolve tool failures
Fixed: remove workflow_logs from git and gitignore them to fix Windows path length cloning issues
